comment: Generate index.d.ts (+ .d.ts.map) for the hand-authored JS leaves from their JSDoc. emitDeclarationOnly writes only declarations — the .js stays the authored, shipped source. Because each .d.ts is now derived from its source, it cannot drift; check-dts-emit.mjs re-emits and byte-compares. Run via `npm run dts:emit`. The behaviors barrel re-exports many modules, so every behaviors/*.js it pulls in is listed here too — the in-place emit deletes each include's .d.ts first (TS5055 guard). (checkJs is intentionally off: the internal pure helpers are untyped and the opt-object defaults trip noImplicitAny; signature-checking the implementations is a separate future enhancement.)
